case_title: OSCAR SOTO ET AL VS. SAN MATEO COUNTY TRANSIT DISTRICT

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SAN MATEO COUNTY TRANSIT DISTRICT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SOTO, OSCAR (DRIVER) ZAVALA, RONELL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN MATEO COUNTY TRANSIT DISTRICT $1,623.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,773.00, JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY. EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-19-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-20-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OSCAR SOTO IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF RONELL ZAVALA IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
